title: Create public Pinake specification documentation
description: Add the public docs deliverables from the original guide: manifest spec, .pinake state schemas, core scaffold reference, architecture overview, UI flow diagrams, wizard scenarios, command table, component matrix, and an example Pinake repo or sample workspace.

checklist.text: Create public manifest and state schema reference docs
Create scaffold, wizard, and UI flow documentation
Create command table and component matrix
Add a sample Pinake workspace and README index links
Verify docs and mark task complete
